name: CJK Bold Fix

releases.author: ebibibi
releases.description:
## CJK Bold Fix v1.0.0

Fixes bold (`**`), italic (`*`), and bold+italic (`***`) rendering for CJK (Chinese/Japanese/Korean) text in Obsidian's Live Preview mode.

### The Problem

CommonMark's emphasis flanking rules break with CJK punctuation, causing `**テスト。**` and similar patterns to not render as bold in the editor.

### How It Works

- Detects where the parser incorrectly applied or missed emphasis
- Overrides wrong emphasis and applies correct styling
- Hides formatting markers (`**`/`*`) in Live Preview (shows them when cursor is on the line)

### Supported

- Japanese, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Korean
- Bold, italic, and bold+italic
- Works alongside other editor extensions
